## Checklist
- [ ] Tests added/updated (`pytest -q`)
- [ ] Lint clean (`ruff check .`)
- [ ] Eval axes kept distinct (retrieval / faithfulness / hallucination / citation / abstention)
- [ ] Docs/CHANGELOG updated if user-facing
